title: Map differentiation between boards
excerpt: Using the map view, is there any way to differentiate between items from one board vs items from another board?

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: Using the map view, is there any way to differentiate between items from one board vs items from another board?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Soroh!

Great question (and suggestion)! I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to colour code by board in the map widget. I really like this idea and will happily share it internally with our team - will provide updates if I get any further insights!

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: So why does it say this on Monday.com’s documentation? https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001263689-The-Map-View

posts.author: gaco.com.au (Elijah Noonan)
posts.cookedHtml: It is saying that it will be based off the groups in one board - unfortunately it won’t carry over multiple boards

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you Elijah - you’re correct here @Soroh I apologise for any confusion caused here! The colours are set according to the group in the board as opposed to the boards specifically.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

We’re super excited to share our new app with the world, Map View Pro.

It allows you to customize the color of the pins on the map (fe.: color them based the board they are coming from) and choose what information is displayed when you click a pin.

Read more on our docs on what colums or data we support as source for the Pin Color and what columns we support for the Info Window.

You can try it for free for 14 days here, if you’re missing anything, do let us know!

Best,

Maarten
